description: Add Word (.docx) and Excel (.xlsx) document creation, editing, and real-time preview capabilities to free-code Web AI Agent

userStories.title: Setup workspace folder structure per session
userStories.description: As a system, I need each session to have its own workspace folder so documents are isolated.
acceptanceCriteria: Create workspace/[session-id]/ directory on session init
Directory path follows format: workspace/[session-id]/
Document APIs can reference workspace-relative paths
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add document file system APIs
userStories.description: As an Agent, I need file system operations so I can manage documents in workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Add createDocument(type: 'word'|'excel', filename: string) function
Add listDocuments() returns array of filenames
Add readDocument(filename: string) returns document content
Add writeDocument(filename: string, content: Buffer) saves to workspace
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: DocumentManager class created with createDocument, listDocuments, readDocument, writeDocument methods

userStories.title: Install docx and preview packages
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the docx packages installed so I can work with Word documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Install 'docx' package for Word document generation
Install 'docx-preview' package for Word document preview
Packages are compatible with current Bun/TypeScript setup
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: docx was already installed; docx-preview package installed successfully

userStories.title: Install xlsx package for Excel
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the xlsx package installed so I can work with Excel documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Install 'xlsx' package for Excel document handling
Package supports .xlsx format read/write
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create WebWordTool for Word document operations
userStories.description: As an Agent, I need a Word document tool so I can create and edit documents.
acceptanceCriteria: WebWordTool class created in src/web/engine/tools/
Supports createDocument(filename, options) with title, paragraphs
Supports readDocument(filename) returning parsed content
Supports writeDocument(filename, content) saving changes
Tool registered in WebSkillTool registry
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: WebWordTool exists with create/read/append actions; registered in engine

userStories.title: Add Word document formatting support
userStories.description: As an Agent, I need to format Word documents so I can fulfill style requests.
acceptanceCriteria: WebWordTool supports text formatting: bold, italic, underline, color, size
WebWordTool supports paragraph alignment: left, center, right, justify
WebWordTool supports adding tables to documents
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added text formatting (bold, italic, underline, color, size), paragraph alignment (left, center, right, justify), and table support via 'table' action

userStories.title: Create WebExcelTool for Excel document operations
userStories.description: As an Agent, I need an Excel document tool so I can create and edit spreadsheets.
acceptanceCriteria: WebExcelTool class created in src/web/engine/tools/
Supports createWorkbook(filename) with multiple sheets
Supports readWorkbook(filename) returning parsed data
Supports writeWorkbook(filename, data) saving changes
Tool registered in WebSkillTool registry
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Excel formula and styling support
userStories.description: As an Agent, I need Excel formulas and styling so I can handle complex spreadsheet tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: WebExcelTool supports cell formulas (SUM, AVERAGE, etc.)
WebExcelTool supports cell styling: font, background, border
WebExcelTool supports column/row resize
WebExcelTool supports cell merge/split
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Word preview component to WorkspacePanel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see Word document previews inline so I can verify edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Add DocxPreview component in src/web/components/
Component renders .docx files in browser using docx-preview
Preview displays in WorkspacePanel when Word doc selected
Preview supports scroll and zoom
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Excel preview component to WorkspacePanel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see Excel spreadsheet previews inline so I can verify edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ExcelPreview component in src/web/components/
Component renders .xlsx files using xlsx library
Preview displays in WorkspacePanel when Excel doc selected
Preview shows cell values, formulas visible
Preview supports scroll and zoom
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add preview refresh mechanism
userStories.description: As a user, I want preview to update automatically so I see edits immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Preview refreshes when document is modified
Manual refresh button available in preview panel
Refresh latency under 500ms for documents under 1MB
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add preview fullscreen mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want fullscreen preview so I can focus on document content.
acceptanceCriteria: Fullscreen toggle button in preview panel header
ESC key exits fullscreen mode
Preview fills entire viewport in fullscreen
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add document export to local download
userStories.description: As a user, I want to download documents so I can use them outside the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Download button in preview panel for each document
Downloads .docx or .xlsx file to local machine
Filename matches document name in workspace
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integrate document tools with Agent prompt
userStories.description: As an Agent, I need to understand document commands so I can fulfill requests.
acceptanceCriteria: WebWordTool and WebExcelTool available in agent tool list
Agent can parse 'create a Word doc named X'
Agent can parse 'edit cell A1 in spreadsheet.xlsx'
Agent can parse 'format title as red bold'
Typecheck passes
